forager.agents

Interface AgentEntity

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    MadkitAgent

    public interface AgentEntity

    An agent in the Forager Game system.

    The AgentEntity interface has to be redefined for each Multiagent System in order to use, their own implementation correctly.

    This provides method to add and remove the agents from the environnement.

    This can communicate with other agent with broadcast or one to one communication.

    This handles deplacement, harvest, hungerness and droping;

    This must contain an instance of Brain.

    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

      Cost in food/energy to produce a children.

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int add(String item, int quantity)
      Add the item or a part of it in the inventory if it fit.
      void broadcast(MessageContent message)
      Broadcast a message to all the agents in range.
      boolean canHarvest()
      Test if the agent is in position to harvest.
      boolean collide(AgentEntity ae, Rectangle box)
      Test if an agent collide with a given hitbox.
      Color color()
      Return the color of the agent.
      boolean copulate(AgentInfo ai)
      Try to create a child with the help of an other agent.
      boolean createAgent(Point pos)
      Create an agent on a given location.
      void die()
      Kill the agent.
      Vector2D direction()
      Return the current direction/orientation vector of the agent.
      int drop(String item, int quantity)
      Drop a certain quantity of item on the ground.
      void eat(int quantity)
      Eat a certain quantity of food/energy.
      AgentEntity getAgent(AgentInfo ai)
      Get an agent from its info.
      List<FixedObject> getCollision(Rectangle hitbox)
      Get the list of objects who collide with the given hitbox.
      List<FixedObject> getCollisionAfterMovement(Vector2D mvment)
      Get the list of objects who collide with the entity after moving from a vector.
      List<MessageContent> getMessages()
      Return the list of messages recieved.
      List<AgentInfo> getVisibleAgents()
      Get the info on all the visible agents.
      List<FixedObject> getVisibleObjects()
      Get the list of all the visible objects.
      void give(AgentInfo ai, String item, int quantity)
      Give a certain quantity of an item to an other agent from your inventory.
      void handleMessage()
      Preprocess the message recieved.
      int harvest(String type)
      Harvest the maximum ressource of this type who collide with the entity.
      boolean haveMessage()
      Test if a message has been recieved.
      Rectangle hitbox()
      Return the agent's hitbox.
      double hunger()
      Return the agent's percentage of hungriness.
      int id()
      Return the id of the agent.
      void increaseHunger()
      Increase the level of hunger.
      AgentInfo info()
      Return the agent's information.
      Inventory inventory()
      Return the agent's inventory.
      boolean isMessage(MessageContent message)
      Test if the message has been recieved.
      Vector2D moveBy(Vector2D direction)
      Move the agent according to a vector.
      void recieveMessageFromOtherType(MessageContent message)
      Recieve a message from an incompatible multiagents system.
      void sendMessage(MessageContent message, AgentInfo ai)
      Send a message to an other agent.
      String team()
      Return the team of the agent.
      void update()
      Update the agent.

    • Field Detail

      • foodType

        static final String foodType
        Item type for food/energy.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • childCost

        static final int childCost
        Cost in food/energy to produce a children. The cost is shared between all genitor.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • width

        static final int width
        Width of the agent.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • height

        static final int height
        Height of the agent.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • add

        int add(String item,
      int quantity)
        Add the item or a part of it in the inventory if it fit.
        Parameters:
        item - The type of item to add, not null.
        quantity - The quantity of item.
        Returns:
        The quantity of item added.

      • broadcast

        void broadcast(MessageContent message)
        Broadcast a message to all the agents in range.

        If possible it should use the multiagents system way to communicate to handle the communication. Else the message will be added directly via recieveMessageFromOtherType

        Parameters:
        message - The message to broadcast, not null.

      • canHarvest

        boolean canHarvest()
        Test if the agent is in position to harvest. Doesn't test if the agent has the capacity or the space to harvest.
        Returns:
        True if the agent is in positon to harvest, else false.

      • collide

        boolean collide(AgentEntity ae,
              Rectangle box)
        Test if an agent collide with a given hitbox.
        Parameters:
        ae - The agent.
        box - The hitbox.
        Returns:
        True if the agent collide, else false.

      • color

        Color color()
        Return the color of the agent. Used only by the UI.
        Returns:
        The color of the agent.

      • copulate

        boolean copulate(AgentInfo ai)
        Try to create a child with the help of an other agent. Creating a child cost food/energy. The child will recieve half his conception cost of food/energy in his inventory.
        Parameters:
        ai - The other agent, not null.
        Returns:
        True if a child is born, else false.

      • createAgent

        boolean createAgent(Point pos)
        Create an agent on a given location. The agent is created with half his conception cost of food/energy in his inventory.
        Parameters:
        pos - The location, not null.
        Returns:
        True if the agent has been created, else false.

      • die

        void die()
        Kill the agent.

      • drop

        int drop(String item,
       int quantity)
        Drop a certain quantity of item on the ground.

        Not implemented yet.

        Returns:
        The quantity of item droped.

      • eat

        void eat(int quantity)
        Eat a certain quantity of food/energy. Decrease your hunger.
        Parameters:
        quantity - The quantity of food/energy to eat.

      • direction

        Vector2D direction()
        Return the current direction/orientation vector of the agent.
        Returns:
        The current direction/orientation vector of the agent.

      • id

        int id()
        Return the id of the agent.
        Returns:
        The id of the agent.

      • give

        void give(AgentInfo ai,
        String item,
        int quantity)
        Give a certain quantity of an item to an other agent from your inventory. Works by sending a RessourceMessage to the other agent. If you give too much, you'll get back what the other can't store.
        Parameters:
        ai - The other agent, not null.
        item - The item type, not null.
        quantity - The quantity of item to give.

      • getAgent

        AgentEntity getAgent(AgentInfo ai)
        Get an agent from its info.
        Parameters:
        ai - The agent's info.
        Returns:
        The agent if it exist in the environnement, else null.

      • getCollision

        List<FixedObject> getCollision(Rectangle hitbox)
        Get the list of objects who collide with the given hitbox.
        Parameters:
        hitbox - The hitbox.
        Returns:
        The list of objects who collide.

      • getCollisionAfterMovement

        List<FixedObject> getCollisionAfterMovement(Vector2D mvment)
        Get the list of objects who collide with the entity after moving from a vector.
        Parameters:
        mvment - The vector of movement.
        Returns:
        The list of objects who collide.

      • getMessages

        List<MessageContent> getMessages()
        Return the list of messages recieved.
        Returns:
        The list of messages recieved.

      • getVisibleAgents

        List<AgentInfo> getVisibleAgents()
        Get the info on all the visible agents.
        Returns:
        The list of info on all the visible agents.

      • getVisibleObjects

        List<FixedObject> getVisibleObjects()
        Get the list of all the visible objects.
        Returns:
        The list of all the visible objects.

      • handleMessage

        void handleMessage()
        Preprocess the message recieved.

        The RessourceMessage will be added to the inventory and if there is too much it's automaticaly send back.

      • harvest

        int harvest(String type)
        Harvest the maximum ressource of this type who collide with the entity.
        Parameters:
        type - The type of ressource.
        Returns:
        The quantity of ressource harvested.

      • haveMessage

        boolean haveMessage()
        Test if a message has been recieved.
        Returns:
        True if a message has been recieved.

      • hitbox

        Rectangle hitbox()
        Return the agent's hitbox.
        Returns:
        The hitbox of entity.

      • hunger

        double hunger()
        Return the agent's percentage of hungriness.
        Returns:
        The percentage of hungriness.

      • increaseHunger

        void increaseHunger()
        Increase the level of hunger. Kill the agents if it's too high.

      • info

        AgentInfo info()
        Return the agent's information.
        Returns:
        The agent's information.

      • inventory

        Inventory inventory()
        Return the agent's inventory.
        Returns:
        The agent's inventory.

      • isMessage

        boolean isMessage(MessageContent message)
        Test if the message has been recieved. Used to verify that the brain doesn't forge fake message.
        Parameters:
        message - The message.
        Returns:
        True if the message has been recieved, else false.

      • moveBy

        Vector2D moveBy(Vector2D direction)
        Move the agent according to a vector. The vector norm will be reduce to 1, if it is higher.
        Parameters:
        direction - The vector of movement, not null.
        Returns:
        The effective movement vector.

      • recieveMessageFromOtherType

        void recieveMessageFromOtherType(MessageContent message)
        Recieve a message from an incompatible multiagents system.
        Parameters:
        message - The message, not null.

      • sendMessage

        void sendMessage(MessageContent message,
               AgentInfo ai)
        Send a message to an other agent.

        If possible it should use the multiagents system way to communicate to handle the communication. Else the message will be added directly via recieveMessageFromOtherType

        Parameters:
        message - The message, not null.
        ai - The agent information, not null.

      • team

        String team()
        Return the team of the agent.

        Not used yet.

        Returns:
        The team of the agent.

      • update

        void update()
        Update the agent. It must call once increaseHunger and Brain.update()
